outlook.summary: Spot price is trading well above the highest listed strikes, indicating strong bullish momentum. All massive call volumes are In-The-Money (ITM), acting as dynamic structural supports and price magnets. Market makers are heavily positioned to defend these levels, creating a firm floor. Expect pullbacks to be aggressively bought at key strikes.

Highest monthly volume (13.6k) acts as a strong friction level between the major support nodes.
The absolute gamma equilibrium point where cumulative GEX shifts, acting as a systemic structural support far below spot.

outlook.summary: The market exhibits a highly unusual structure where spot (7000.75) is trading significantly above the highest available Call strike (6800). All listed calls are deep In-The-Money, creating massive structural support magnets. The only upside resistance is derived from deep ITM Puts. Negative GEX across all expiries suggests unstable, amplified price action if spot declines towards the options strikes.

levels.motivazione: ITM Put strikes act as resistance. Highest Put OI in the dataset provides a structural ceiling above spot.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: ITM Put resistance active
